label: Seamline Sleeper Cell
description: Seamline Sleeper Cell is a narrow guest chamber hollowed directly from the basalt-glass vault behind The Prismworn Cask, its walls burnished to a soot-dark luster beneath a permanent grit of electrostatically pinned glass dust. A low berth of fused mirror-slag and packed mineral fabric rests against seam-line tracery set into the floor, maintaining the tavern’s calibrated alignment to Lacrymara’s auroral girdle. A slitted prism-lamp refracts the copper-white twilight into measured bands across a shallow wash niche and a recessed lockbox shelf. Cistern-fed condensers keep the air cool and mineral-clean, leaving the room’s surfaces dry, bright-edged, and acoustically hushed.
